description: The ID of the event to expire.
name: sigsci-get-requests

outputs.description: The unique ID of the request. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.ServerHostName The server hostname.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.ID

outputs.description: The remote IP address. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.RemoteHostName The remote hostname.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.RemoteIP

outputs.description: The remote country code. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.UserAgent The user agent of the request.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.RemoteCountryCode

outputs.description: The timestamp (RFC3339 format). SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.Method The HTTP method, for example, “PUT”.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.Timestamp

outputs.description: The server name. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.Protocol The HTTP protocol, for example, “HTTP/1.1” .
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.ServerName

outputs.description: The HTTP response code. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.ResponseSize The HTTP response size.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Request.ResponseCode
